image: 长城是中国古代的军事防御工程总长度超过2万公里
description_zh: The Great Wall is an ancient military defense project stretching over 20000 km
description_en: 长城的英文名直译就是伟大的墙是世界新七大奇迹之一

image: 八达岭长城是长城最著名的段落每年接待游客超过1000万人次
description_zh: Badaling is the most famous section of the Great Wall receiving over 10 million visitors annually
description_en: 不到长城非好汉 He who has never been to the Great Wall is not a true man

image: 故宫是中国明清两代的皇家宫殿拥有9999间半房间
description_zh: The Forbidden City served as the imperial palace for the Ming and Qing dynasties
description_en: 故宫的英文名是紫禁城 Forbidden City因为普通人禁止进入

image: 太和殿是故宫最大的宫殿是皇帝举行重大典礼的地方
description_zh: The Hall of Supreme Harmony is the largest hall in the Forbidden City
description_en: Supreme Harmony意思是至高的和谐体现了中国和的哲学
